description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style airplane with a unique semi-circular wing design and a predominantly white and red color scheme. The wings are broad and rounded, with red tips and scalloped red accents along the leading edge, giving it a distinctive appearance. The fuselage is short and streamlined, with a single propeller mounted at the nose and a small, enclosed cockpit situated near the front. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer with the registration number '12894' and the word 'ARUP' prominently displayed. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller nose wheel, all fixed and exposed. Large, bold lettering on the wings and fuselage further accentuates its retro aesthetic.
description: A compact, retro airplane with a semi-circular wing, red and white color scheme, and bold markings. Features a single propeller, enclosed cockpit, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the scalloped red wing edges, single propeller, and cockpit placement near the front.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the broad, semi-circular wings and large 'ARUP' lettering.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the tail section, vertical stabilizer, and registration markings.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the propeller, fixed landing gear, and the full span of the rounded wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, semi-circular planform with no visible dihedral or winglets; straight leading edge with scalloped red accents.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle configuration with fixed, exposed landing gear; two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy.
